channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bollard on corner, 28th March
item.description:
Of Densworth Grove and Town Road has been knocked out of the ground quite a few loose paving stones been moved as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Town Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th March
item.description:
Someone had left all their rubbish here and it’s been here for a few days now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Gardens, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged metal grate, 28th March
item.description:
Damaged metal grate cover needs replacing as it is becoming a trip hazard. Location is outside the Dun Buns takeaway shop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped unwanted sofa by tree on our street, 28th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish yet again on our street it’s near 19 Osterley Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osterley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 28th March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike store, 28th March
item.description:
Berthon Street opposite Parrk Please remove graffiti from bike storage racks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berthon Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike obstructing way, 28th March
item.description:
Bike constantly park in the middle of the pavement no room for disabled people to pass trough

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, West Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Rose Pharmacy. Remove graffiti from shutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafgiti, 28th March
item.description:
Creek Road dental practice 20 Creek Road Remove graffiti from shutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Mama Nasha 16-18 Creek Road Remove graffiti from shutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Margaret McMilliam Halls of residence. Remove graffiti from wall to block H near Sainsburys

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes, 28th March
item.description:
The lime bikes are constantly dumped here, at some point i have counted more than 20 bikes, as soon as they are cleared they begin building up again, this happens on a daily basis it is right by a play park and it obstructs a public footpath. SOMETHING HAS TO BE DONE TO PERMANENTLY PREVENT THIS HAPPENING

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welland Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 28th March
item.description:
Creek Riad Remove flypostering from Lamppost CR001

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bunch of rubbish dumped in corner by fence, 28th March
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for the past week or so

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sandy Hill Road SE18, 28th March
item.description:
Blocked street gullies outside numbers 11 and 30 Sandy hill Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich

item.title: Flypostering, 28th March
item.description:
McMilliam Street by Communal Allotment. Please clear flypostering from post

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Armada Street, Deptford

item.title: Litter bin bag, 28th March
item.description:
Outsidd Armsda Court. Litter bin bag by zebra crossing requires emptying

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

item.title: In front of the building of Brook wood House, 28th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in front of the Brook Wood house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous tree, 28th March
item.description:
A very tall tree at number 86 Petersham Drive the roots are travelling under the houses and raising the door steps, the branches are blocking view and blocking satellite signals
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, 28th March
item.description:
Upstairs has fly-tipped fridge on pavement. Was marked as resolved. It is not, it is STILL there!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
